module_info.docstring:
Skill Manager Tool -- Agent-Managed Skill Creation & Editing

Allows the agent to create, update, and delete skills, turning successful
approaches into reusable procedural knowledge. New skills are created in
~/.hermes/skills/. Existing skills (bundled, hub-installed, or user-created)
can be modified or deleted wherever they live.

Skills are the agent's procedural memory: they capture *how to do a specific
type of task* based on proven experience. General memory (MEMORY.md, USER.md) is
broad and declarative. Skills are narrow and actionable.

Actions:
  create     -- Create a new skill (SKILL.md + directory structure)
  edit       -- Replace the SKILL.md content of a user skill (full rewrite)
  patch      -- Targeted find-and-replace within SKILL.md or any supporting file
  delete     -- Remove a user skill entirely
  write_file -- Add/overwrite a supporting file (reference, template, script, asset)
  remove_file-- Remove a supporting file from a user skill

Directory layout for user skills:
    ~/.hermes/skills/
    ├── my-skill/
    │   ├── SKILL.md
    │   ├── references/
    │   ├── templates/
    │   ├── scripts/
    │   └── assets/
    └── category-name/
        └── another-skill/
            └── SKILL.md

functions.name: _security_scan_skill
functions.docstring: Scan a skill directory after write. Returns error string if blocked, else None.

functions.name: check_skill_manage_requirements
functions.docstring: Skill management has no external requirements -- always available.

functions.name: _validate_name
functions.docstring: Validate a skill name. Returns error message or None if valid.

functions.name: _validate_frontmatter
functions.docstring:
Validate that SKILL.md content has proper frontmatter with required fields.
Returns error message or None if valid.

functions.name: _resolve_skill_dir
functions.docstring: Build the directory path for a new skill, optionally under a category.

functions.name: _find_skill
functions.docstring:
Find a skill by name in ~/.hermes/skills/.
Returns {"path": Path} or None.

functions.name: _validate_file_path
functions.docstring:
Validate a file path for write_file/remove_file.
Must be under an allowed subdirectory and not escape the skill dir.

functions.name: _create_skill
functions.docstring: Create a new user skill with SKILL.md content.

functions.name: _edit_skill
functions.docstring: Replace the SKILL.md of any existing skill (full rewrite).

functions.name: _patch_skill
functions.docstring:
Targeted find-and-replace within a skill file.

Defaults to SKILL.md. Use file_path to patch a supporting file instead.
Requires a unique match unless replace_all is True.

functions.name: _write_file
functions.docstring: Add or overwrite a supporting file within any skill directory.

functions.name: _remove_file
functions.docstring: Remove a supporting file from any skill directory.

functions.name: skill_manage
functions.docstring:
Manage user-created skills. Dispatches to the appropriate action handler.

Returns JSON string with results.
